content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 9, 0), (6, 9, 1), (1, 3, 2), (2, 4, 8), (3, 5, 9), (8, 9, 11), (0, 9, 12), (3, 7, 17), (7, 8, 17), (0, 4, 19), (5, 9, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 8 exactly at time 11.

First, we will go through each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (2, 9, 0) has node 2 and time 0. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (6, 9, 1) has node 6 and time 1. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 3, 2) has node 1 and time 2. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (2, 4, 8) has node 2 and time 8. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (3, 5, 9) has node 3 and time 9. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (8, 9, 11) has node 8 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 9, 12) has node 0 and time 12. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 7, 17) has node 3 and time 17. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (7, 8, 17) has node 7 and time 17. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 4, 19) has node 0 and time 19. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (5, 9, 19) has node 5 and time 19. -> Add node 9.

Now we have the following nodes linked with node 8 at time 11:
9, 5, 4, 3, 2

Answer: [9, 5, 4, 3, 2]
